tagline: Beka i-repo yakho kuzo zonke izibophezelo.

hero.title: Sawubona kuzo zonke izilimi
hero.lede: Leli khasi lihunyushwa yi-Resource Translator uqobo, kuzo zonke izilimi ezisekelwayo, kuzo zonke izilimi ezisekelwa yi-Azure AI Translator.

phrases.ship_anywhere: Thumela isoftware yakho noma kuphi emhlabeni.

features.reliable: Phinda ujikeleze yonke i-byte yamafayela akho omthombo.
features.configurable: Ithoni, imboni, i-glossary, ukuhlambalaza - konke kulungiselelwe.
features.ci_native: Yakhelwe Izenzo zeGitHub kanye nokudonsa-isicelo sokuhamba komsebenzi.

footer.powered_by: Inikwe amandla yi-Resource Translator ne-Azure AI Translator.
